alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits for foodstuffs and food ingredients
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiological limits for foodstuffs and food ingredients, including those relevant to seasoning and snack products, must be verified against the full text of GSO 1016:2015.

alerts.title: Added: India Allergen List - Mandatory Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required for specific allergens and declaration format as per FSS (Labelling and Display) Regulations, 2020.. Food products containing specified allergens (e.g., milk, soy, wheat, nuts) must declare them prominently. The exact list of allergens and the prescribed format for declaration must be verified by consulting the FSS (Labelling and Display) Regulations, 2020, and its amendments.

alerts.title: Added: India Labelling Requirement - Front-of-Pack Labelling (FoPL) for High Fat, Sugar, Sodium (HFSS)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required for thresholds and warning format as per FSS (Labelling and Display) Regulations, 2020.. Processed food products, including snacks, that exceed specified thresholds for fat, sugar, or sodium are required to carry mandatory front-of-pack warning labels. The exact thresholds and the prescribed warning format must be verified by consulting the FSS (Labelling and Display) Regulations, 2020, and its amendments.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Non-permitted additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Import or sale of food products containing non-permitted additives is prohibited.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Within SFA's regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Import or sale of food products containing contaminants or incidental constituents that exceed regulatory limits is prohibited.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Must be declared in list of ingredients on food labels. New: Check official source.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - General labelling compliance
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration. These allergens require mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10 or more. Sulphite at or above this concentration requires mandatory labeling.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Prohibited Food Products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required for specific list. Refer to specific Ministry of Public Health Notifications and FDA Notifications for detailed requirements on prohibited foods.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Additive Limits - Delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited from use. New: Prohibited. Delisted color additives are in FDA regulations (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30).

alerts.title: Modified: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited from use. New: Prohibited. Prohibited substances are listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189) as prohibited from use in food.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, sesame. These are the nine major food allergens recognized by U.S. law (FALCPA and FASTER Act). Sesame became the 9th major allergen effective January 1, 2023.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 20. New: 20. This is an Action Level for total aflatoxins in foods.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - "Gluten-free" claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet FDA's defined standard. FDA issued a final rule defining “gluten-free” for food labeling. Compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the 'gluten-free' claim were issued on August 12, 2020.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen cross-contact and undeclared allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Controls must be implemented. The FDA's "Current Good Manufacturing Practice, Hazard Analysis, and Risk-Based Preventive Controls for Human Food" rule (21 CFR part 117) establishes requirements for allergen preventive controls.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on labels. Identified as allergenic substances.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Must be specifically labeled. New: Must be declared. Required by the Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act of 2004 (FALCPA).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of specific types/species for certain allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared. The specific type of tree nut, species of fish, and species of Crustacean shellfish must be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be identified on labels. Required due to potential hypersensitivity reactions.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Labelling Requirement - Format for Major Food Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: In parentheses after ingredient name OR in a "contains" statement. New: Must appear in parentheses after ingredient name OR in a "contains" statement. The allergen's food source must be declared at least once on the food label.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Products with undeclared allergens or lacking required allergen information
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Considered misbranded or adulterated. Such products are subject to enforcement actions like recalls, import refusal, and seizure.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: ≥10. Must be declared on food labels when present at or above this concentration due to adverse reactions in sensitive individuals.

alerts.title: Removed: China Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. Users are encouraged to consult the database and its Preamble.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via the Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA) Online Database (Codex STAN 192-1995). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and CCCF established levels. Codex establishes Maximum Levels (MLs) for contaminants to protect human health, which are legally permitted maximum concentrations. The Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF) establishes and endorses these levels.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins in Spices
alerts.details: New: Follow Code of Practice for prevention and reduction. A specific Code of Practice (CXC 78-2017) exists for the prevention and reduction of mycotoxins in spices.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (e.g., mycotoxins, metals like arsenic, lead, mercury)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via the General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.details: Old: Follow the Code of Practice for the Prevention and Reduction of Mycotoxins in Spices (CXC 78-2017). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The database provides information on approved food additives and their conditions of use, based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites in specific foods, and also process hygiene criteria.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Halal food general requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification required. General requirements for Halal food, applicable to seasoning and snack products, must be verified against the full text of GSO 2055-1:2015.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Labelling requirements for prepackaged food
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against the full text of GSO 9:2022.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Mandatory expiration date requirements for food products, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against the full text of GSO 150-1:2013.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Halal food general requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 2055-1:2015. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 150-1:2013. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Voluntary expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 150-2:2013. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological criteria
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 1016:2015. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: India Additive Limits - Permitted Food Additives and their Maximum Permitted Levels (MPL)
alerts.details: New: Verification required against FSS (Food Products Standards and Food Additives) Regulations, 2011 and subsequent amendments.. The specific list of permitted food additives and their maximum permitted levels (MPL) for each food category must be verified by consulting the detailed schedules and provisions of the FSS (Food Products Standards and Food Additives) Regulations, 2011, and any subsequent amendments.

alerts.title: Added: India Labelling Requirement - General Mandatory Labelling Information
alerts.details: New: Verification required for all mandatory labelling elements as per FSS (Labelling and Display) Regulations, 2020.. All pre-packaged food products must display essential information such as the name of the food, ingredients list, nutritional information, net quantity, FSSAI License number, manufacturer details, date markings, and instructions for use. Specific requirements for display and content must be verified by consulting the FSS (Labelling and Display) Regulations, 2020, and its amendments.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for food additives in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified by consulting the relevant BPOM regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Additive Limits - Compliance for Imported Processed Foods
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Allergen List - Allergen Declaration
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific requirements for allergen declaration in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified by consulting the relevant BPOM regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - Chemical Contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for chemical contaminants (e.g., heavy metals, pesticides) in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified by consulting the relevant BPOM regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - Compliance for Imported Processed Foods
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Category Classification
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Food categories for processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified according to BPOM regulations, specifically PERKABPOM Nomor 34 Tahun 2019 concerning Food Categories.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - General Compliance
alerts.details: New: Compliance with BPOM regulations required. All processed food products, including seasoning and snack products, must comply with the regulations issued by Badan Pengawas Obat dan Makanan (BPOM) of Indonesia. Specific regulations must be consulted for detailed requirements.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Labelling Warnings
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific requirements for labelling warnings and other general labelling information for processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified by consulting the relevant BPOM regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Compliance for Imported Processed Foods
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Export Certificate for Processed Foods
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - Microbiological Contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for microbiological contaminants in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified by consulting the relevant BPOM regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - Compliance for Imported Processed Foods
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt/Sodium Content
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for salt/sodium content in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified by consulting the relevant BPOM regulations under the 'Pangan Olahan' category.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of specific food additive regulations is required.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Specifications and Standards for Food and Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of specific specifications and standards for food and food additives under the Food Sanitation Act is required. This document also covers microbiology and contaminant limits.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Use of additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required (prohibited unless specified by MHLW as harmless). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Compliance with the Positive List System for Agricultural Chemical Residues in Food is required.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Bovine Spongiform Encephalopathy (BSE)
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of BSE-related food safety measures is required.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Radioactivity
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of regulations on food contaminated by radioactivity is required.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Contamination or addition of foreign substances in food/additives
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited for sale/handling if likely to cause harm. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, pharmaceuticals
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited if exceeding MHLW specified quantity. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Standards for apparatus, containers, packaging, raw materials, and production methods
alerts.details: Old: Verification required (must conform to MHLW established standards/criteria). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances in apparatus, containers, and packaging
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited for sale/production/import/use if likely to cause harm. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances in food/additives
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited for sale/handling (unless specified harmless). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Food Sanitation Law Compliance
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Compliance with the Food Sanitation Law is required, which serves as a foundational legal framework for food safety, including additives, contaminants, and labelling.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Health Claims, Special Dietary Uses, Nutrition Labeling
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of regulations concerning health claims, food for special dietary uses, and nutrition labeling is required.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Food safety
alerts.details: Old: Ensure safety. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Hazard response
alerts.details: Old: Take necessary measures appropriately and promptly. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Import of food/additives requiring sanitation management certification
alerts.details: Old: Must have certificates from exporting country's governmental organization. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Import of food/additives requiring special process control
alerts.details: Old: Must be produced/processed in MHLW specified countries/facilities. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Production, processing, use, cooking, preservation methods, and ingredients
alerts.details: Old: Verification required (must conform to MHLW established criteria/standards). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.
